metadata.name: Guest Left Item in Room Safe

description: A housekeeper finds that a checked-out guest has left the room safe locked.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper reports the locked safe to their supervisor.
The supervisor and a security officer go to the room to open the safe with a master key/code.

expected_outcome.value: The safe is opened following a two-person integrity policy.

nodes.task_description: They find a passport inside, log it immediately in the lost and found system, and store it in the main hotel safe.

expected_outcome.value: The high-value item is logged and securely stored.

nodes.task_description: The agent attempts to contact the guest to inform them.

expected_outcome.value: A message is left for the guest about their found passport.
